title: tofieldia calyculata var. glacialis
intro: Tofieldia calyculata var. glacialis, also known as Glacier Buttercup, is a rare, alpine plant species belonging to the family Tofieldiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and promoting wound healing, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Tofieldia calyculata var. glacialis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its uses and preparations may require further research and validation.
